name: Nuburu, Inc.
description: Nuburu, Inc. is a developer and manufacturer of industrial blue laser technology. The company's proprietary blue lasers are designed to provide high-speed, high-quality metal processing, particularly for materials like copper, aluminum, and other reflective metals. Nuburu's technology is utilized across various industries, including e-mobility, automotive, aerospace, and consumer electronics, enabling faster and more precise welding and 3D printing compared to traditional infrared lasers.
